crypto.name: JWT (Shared Secret)

key_source.note: README recommends JWT with jwt_key_type=SHARED_SECRET, reusing the HTTP Signature merchant_keyid + merchant_secretkey credentials and enabling MLE. The exact HTTP header carrying the JWT, the JWT header/claims, and the signing algorithm are NOT in this source (documented in the developer portal).

verify.method: JWT signed with the shared secret
verify.desc: Recommended authentication. Wire format (header name + JWT structure) not stated in source.

crypto.source: README.md > Authentication > For JWT authentication with Shared Secret (Recommended)

crypto.name: HTTP Signature

key_source.note: Deprecated per README. The Signature header construction (signed-headers list, digest algorithm, keyid/algorithm tokens, timestamp format) is NOT in this source.

verify.desc: Deprecated; migrate to JWT with Shared Secret. Wire format not stated in source.

crypto.source: README.md > Authentication > For HTTP Signature authentication (Deprecated)

crypto.name: Message Level Encryption (MLE)

key_source.note: README states MLE encrypts messages at the application level before they are sent, and is supported with JWT (shared secret) and MetaKey. The encryption algorithm/keys/steps are in the SDK's Logging/MLE feature docs, not in these sources.

crypto.source: README.md > Features > Message Level Encryption (MLE) Feature

field_conditions.rule: currency is a required field for Authorization; for an authorization reversal or capture you must use the same currency as the original authorization.
Include either totalAmount or the first line item's unitPrice for the order (Card Present).
field_conditions.source: Ptsv2paymentsOrderInformationAmountDetails.md > totalAmount ('Card Present Required to include either this field or orderInformation.lineItems[].unitPrice')

field_conditions.rule: Card number and expiration month/year are required if pointOfSaleInformation.entryMode=keyed (optional only if the account is configured for relaxed requirements).
field_conditions.source: Ptsv2paymentsPaymentInformationCard.md > number / expirationMonth / expirationYear ('Required if pointOfSaleInformation.entryMode=keyed')

test_cases.name: Process a Payment (authorization) — representative request
test_cases.source: samples/simple-authorizationinternet.md (official CyberSource Python sample: clientReferenceInformation.code=TC50171_3, card 4111111111111111 exp 12/2031, totalAmount 102.21 USD, billTo John Doe).

missing.detail: The on-the-wire authentication header(s) for both JWT and HTTP Signature — header name(s), the Signature construction (signed-headers list, digest/HMAC algorithm, keyid, timestamp), and the JWT header/claims — are not in the provided sources (developer portal only).
MLE encryption algorithm, key management, and request/response transform steps are not in the provided sources (SDK MLE feature docs only).
Most conditional requiredness is processor-specific and not fully enumerated in these SDK docs; only a few source-stated conditions are captured.
